zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Heriz於大約1290年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾素斯 文費爾德時，她的父親John de Heriz II50歲，母親Matilda Loudham38歲。她於1293年與Sir Robert de Pierrepont在英國德比夏爾素斯 文費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1328年之前在英國諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Heriz于大约1290年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾素斯 文費爾德时，她的父亲John de Heriz II50岁，母亲Matilda Loudham38岁。她于1293年与Sir Robert de Pierrepont在英国德比夏爾素斯 文費爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1328年之前在英国諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特。

nameMeanings.name: Heriz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Herz   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. Compare   Gertz   2.
Germanized or Americanized form of Sorbian Herc (see Herz 5).
Danish and Swedish: of German origin (see   Herz  ).

variants.name: Herz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Fritz, Gerhard, Hans, Helmut, Ilse, Arnd, Egon, Ewald, Heinz, Irmgard.
German: from a personal name derived from a short form of the various ancient Germanic compound names with the first element hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’.
German: nickname for a stout-hearted or kind-hearted individual, from Middle High German herze ‘heart’.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Heriz was born about 1290, in South Wingfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Heriz II, was 50 and her mother, Matilda Loudham, was 38. She married Sir Robert de Pierrepont in 1293, in South Wingfield, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died before 1328, in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Heriz est née environ 1290, à South Wingfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Heriz II, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Matilda Loudham, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert de Pierrepont en 1293, à South Wingfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 1328, à Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1293 in South Wingfield, Derbyshire, England Sir Robert de Pierrepont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 1328 in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Herizが約1290年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアソウス ウィングフィールドで生まれた時，父John de Heriz IIは50歳，母Matilda Loudhamは38歳であった。1293年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアソウス ウィングフィールドでSir Robert de Pierrepontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1328年以前にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホールメ ピエレプオントで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Heriz(이)가 대략 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 소우스 윙필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Heriz II(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Loudham(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1293년 영국 더비실르 소우스 윙필드에서 Sir Robert de Pierrepont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1328년 이전 영국 노틴그함실르 홀 피레폰트에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Heriz nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em South Wingfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Heriz II, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Loudham, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert de Pierrepont em 1293, em South Wingfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Heriz родилась около 1290 г. в местности соут вингфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Heriz II было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Loudham, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert de Pierrepont в 1293 г. в местности соут вингфиелд, дирбишир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 1328 г. в местности холм пьиррепонт, ноттингхамшир, Англия.
